summary.zh: 用透明度建立或移除元素，适合低干扰的内容出现与消失。
summary.en: Introduce or remove an element with opacity for low-distraction state changes.

definition.zh: 元素通过改变不透明度出现或消失。
definition.en: An opacity transition brings an element into view or carries it out without changing its geometry.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制动效开始前的等待时间。
description.en: Controls the wait before motion begins.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 低干扰地表达内容出现、消失或可见性变化。
purpose.en: Communicate appearance, disappearance, or visibility changes with minimal distraction.

frequency.zh: 适合中高频状态变化；重复出现时将时长控制在 120–220ms。
frequency.en: Suitable for medium- to high-frequency state changes; keep repeated uses around 120–220ms.

trigger.zh: 由内容挂载、异步完成、筛选结果变化或明确的显示状态触发。
trigger.en: Trigger from mounting, async completion, filter-result changes, or an explicit visibility state.

enterExit.zh: 进入从低透明度到完全可见；离开应在卸载前完成淡出。
enterExit.en: Enter from low opacity to fully visible; finish the exit fade before unmounting.

interruptibility.zh: 新状态到来时从当前透明度继续，避免先跳回起点。
interruptibility.en: When state changes again, continue from the current opacity without resetting to the start.

gestureRules.zh: 无需手势控制；交互控件仍要立即更新可访问状态。
gestureRules.en: No gesture control is required; interactive controls still update accessible state immediately.

reducedMotion.zh: 保留一次 80–120ms 的短淡入淡出，重要信息同步使用静态对比。
reducedMotion.en: Keep a brief 80–120ms fade and pair important information with a static contrast change.

reviewNotes.zh: 确认淡出期间元素不会继续接收点击。
reviewNotes.en: Ensure the element stops receiving clicks while it fades out.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查透明内容不会与背景形成难读的中间状态。
reviewNotes.en: Check that translucent intermediate states remain legible against the background.
